member_long_descriptions: Partial view of a dark-stained wooden side table with a rectangular top, turned front legs and a visible lower shelf holding small items; glossy finish with minor surface wear, tabletop shows a potted plant and papers; right side of the table is cut off by the image edge — estimated distance ~1.0 m from camera.

Square wall-mounted picture frame with a thin black outer frame, white mat with a narrow blue inner border, and a central sailboat print under glass showing a small reflection; lower-right of the frame is partially occluded/cropped by a brown object; estimated camera distance ~1.2 m.

Front-facing black/dark-brown leather three-seat couch with segmented padded seat and back cushions, vertical stitching, visible creases and a glossy sheen; arm consoles with cupholder/controls are partially visible at the sides and the left and right edges of the couch are slightly cropped — appears about 1.5 m from the camera.

White-painted rectangular wall picture frame with white mat containing a small seascape print (blue sky and water with an orange boat/structure); lower-right of the frame and artwork are partially occluded by a diagonal brown wooden bannister/railing; appears wall-mounted and is approximately 1.2 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dark-stained wooden side table with a rectangular top and straight square legs; tabletop holds stacked papers/magazine and a small potted plant, and the near corner shows scuffs and wear — appears close to the camera at approximately 0.7 meters away.

White flared fabric/parchment lampshade with visible vertical seams over a partially visible reflective gold-tone base with a faceted crystal accent; lower base is partially cropped and occluded by foreground foliage, lamp appears to be a nearby tabletop lamp roughly 1.0 m from the camera.

Narrow vertical crop of the left edge of a cream-painted wooden picture frame with a simple molded profile and minor scuffing; interior reveals a sliver of the framed seaside painting (blue sky and sandy tones). The frame is partially visible and edge-cropped, photographed at close range (approx. 0.5 m).

White rectangular picture frame with a light-blue mat showing a seaside/umbrella print; the framed print is partially edge-cropped in the upper-left of the crop and is partly occluded by a foreground wooden stair banister; frame appears intact and wall-mounted, approximately 2.5 meters from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dark brown wooden side table with a rectangular top, visible straight square leg and lower shelf; wood appears slightly glossy and holds small objects and a plant on top — estimated distance ~0.8 m from camera.

Partial wall-mounted rectangular picture frame with a thin black outer border and white mat surrounding a faint sketch-like print; lower-right area is occluded by a translucent curtain or railing in the foreground and the image appears slightly soft — roughly 2.5 meters from the camera.

Rectangular black frame with a white mat and a faint central sketch or print, wall-mounted and partially cut off in the crop; diagonally occluded by a foreground wooden handrail and white spindles, slightly blurred/low-resolution — estimated ~2.0 m from the camera.

Off-white scalloped fabric lampshade with pleated panels and decorative lower trim; a dark ornate base is partially visible at the lower-left and the shade is partially cropped at the top/left edges — appears about 0.7 meters from the camera.

Close-up of a dark brown leather couch with glossy, slightly worn upholstery, vertical stitched seams and padded segmented back cushions; right armrest with built-in console visible and left/bottom edges of the couch are cropped out of the image — estimated distance ~1.5 m from camera.

White plastic rectangular electrical outlet cover mounted vertically on a light beige wall; two screw holes and faint smudges are visible; the crop is small and edge‑cropped (partial view); appears close to the camera, approximately 0.5 m away.

Close-up of a white-painted double-hung window partially cropped at the right and bottom edges, fitted with white horizontal venetian blinds (plastic/metal) whose slats are slightly tilted and show an exterior building through gaps; pull cord visible at right — photographed from approximately 0.5 m away.

Top portion of a dark bluish-gray metal fireplace surround with horizontal ridged trim and a rectangular black opening; inner edge shows soot-darkening and a partially visible stone/log hearth at the bottom, crop is partial and edge-cropped (top and sides), approximate camera distance ~1.5 m.

Partial potted variegated plant with long, narrow, arching green leaves that show lighter/cream central striping; the foliage is cut off by the right edge of the crop and slightly blurred, appearing to sit indoors roughly 0.7 m from the camera.

Wall-mounted analog clock with a white face, black Roman numerals and black hands set in a dark scalloped glossy frame that appears metal or painted wood; image is slightly blurred and low-resolution, estimated camera distance ~2.0 meters.

Close-up of a black glossy leather armchair/recliner showing a padded, tufted back cushion and a padded left armrest with visible creases and wear; the right and top edges are cropped out of the frame. Approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Partial edge-cropped view of a dark glossy wooden picture frame with a thin gold inner trim, showing the bottom-right corner around a colorful seaside print with small printed text; rectangular, vertical orientation and photographed from close range (approx. 0.6 m).

Partial, edge-cropped dark mahogany wooden barstool with a black padded seat cushion, turned legs and a circular footrest; ornate carved back is partially visible and the wood has a glossy finish — estimated distance ~1.0 m from the camera.

Front-facing stainless steel oven with a black-glass viewing window and a white kitchen towel draped over the handle; lower storage drawer visible and control area at the top partially shown; the appliance is edge-cropped in the photo and appears photographed from about 0.8 m.

Close-up of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a raised rectangular center panel and subtle wood grain; glossy finish with minor scuffs near the lower edge and the crop is edge‑cut/partial — approximately 0.7 m from the camera.

Tall brown painted wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular central panel and narrow inner trim; surface shows minor scuffs and slight blur, the right edge is cut off in the crop — appears approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Partial/cropped dark brown stained-wood upper kitchen cabinet door with recessed paneling and a matte finish; vertical orientation, appears intact and sits above a stainless-steel microwave visible at the lower edge — estimated ~0.8 m from the camera.

Tall, narrow dark-brown wooden cabinet with vertical paneled doors and a matte finish, shown mostly along the left edge of the image and partially cut off at top and bottom; a small projecting upper box is visible on the right side of the cabinet, surface shows minor wear and shadowing, and it appears to be about 1.0–1.5 meters from the camera.

Tall dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and simple rectangular frame, closed and occupying most of the crop; surface appears slightly worn with dim lighting, estimated ~1.0 m from camera.

Tall, narrow dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and rectangular frame; varnished surface shows a vertical light reflection, no visible hardware, faint wear/scuffs near edges, and the top/bottom appear slightly cropped — estimated ~1.5 m from camera.

Close-up of a dark brown wooden lower kitchen cabinet door with recessed paneled face and vertical trim, glossy stained finish, countertop overhang visible above; crop is edge-cut on the right (partial view); estimated distance ~0.8 m from camera.

Rectangular table with a light wood laminate top and a dark-stained wooden cabinet-style base featuring two vertical doors and a small price tag on the right; sides are slightly edge-cropped in the image and the base shows minor surface wear; object appears about 1.0 m from the camera.

Front-facing black plastic drip coffee maker with a visible glass carafe and silver accents; appears as a countertop appliance, somewhat cropped at the bottom edge of the image (partial view); estimated distance from camera ~0.6 m.

Tall dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and glossy wood-veneer finish; image shows the door edge-cropped and filling most of the frame, with visible vertical grain and a few faint scuffs; no hardware visible — approximate distance ~1.2 m.

Partial front view of a stainless-steel microwave with a dark reflective glass door and horizontal metallic trim; edge-cropped and showing surface reflections and smudges, approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
Partial, edge-cropped chrome curved faucet spout with a polished reflective metal surface and narrow neck visible in a close-up; appears to be photographed at approximately 0.5 m from the camera.

Close-up of a partial chrome faucet neck and upper spout, vertically oriented and edge-cropped at the image border; reflective metallic surface with slight smudging/streaks visible, photographed at close range (approx. 0.4 m from camera).
Partial dark brown wooden cabinet door with recessed rectangular panels and a central vertical seam, matte finish and low lighting; cropped at the left edge and approximately 0.7 m from the camera.

Tall dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and smooth finish; appears wall-mounted in a kitchen, mostly visible but slightly edge-cropped, with a stainless-steel appliance visible at the right; approximate distance from camera ~0.7 m.

Low-pile cream/beige rectangular woven rug with a short fringed edge and small orange-red pattern/stain near the upper-left; the rug is partially cut off by the crop and rests on a wooden floor — approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Partial/cropped view of a dark-stained wooden base cabinet with vertical recessed panel doors and a varnished finish; visible scuffing and wear along the lower edge and toe-kick, countertop edge visible at top right of the crop — appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m away).

Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a smooth, flat panel surface and a small white rectangular sticker near the upper-right; the right and bottom edges of the cabinet are cropped in the image and no handle is visible — estimated distance about 1.5 meters from the camera.

Close-up of a chrome, cylindrical faucet spout and short base, vertically oriented and cut off by the crop edges; reflective metal surface with smudges/watermarks is visible, suggesting the object is about 0.4 m from the camera.

Dark brown wooden side table with a rectangular top, turned legs and a lower shelf, surface shows minor wear and objects (plant and papers) on top; the right edge of the table is cropped by the image — approximate distance ~0.8 m from camera.

Rectangular wall-mounted picture frame containing a small sailboat print with double white mat; frame has a thin silver inner trim and a thicker dark outer border, visible glass glare, and is partially cropped/occluded at the lower-right edge by a brown foreground object — appears edge-cropped and approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Frontal view of a dark brown leather three-seat couch with vertically segmented padded backrests, tufted/quilted seat panels and visible stitched seams and surface creases; padded armrests with a built-in console on the right are visible and the couch fills most of the crop, appearing approximately 1.2 meters from the camera.

Partial white-painted wooden rectangular picture frame with a light mat showing a small seascape image (blue sky, pale blue water and an orange-brown pier or structure); lower-right of the frame is occluded by a diagonal dark wooden banister and the frame is edge-cropped in the crop image, with visible glass reflection — estimated distance ~1.5 m from the camera.

Dark stained wooden side table with a rectangular glossy top and straight square leg, lower shelf holding a woven basket and visible clutter on top (magazines, a small potted plant and a remote); the right side is partially edge-cropped and the table sits directly beside a dark leather sofa — estimated distance ~0.6 m from camera.

Off-white fabric lampshade with vertical pleats and a flared, scalloped lower rim sitting on a small brass/glass base that is partially cropped at the bottom of the image; a plant slightly occludes the front — appears about 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial vertical edge crop of a narrow gold-toned picture frame with a beaded inner molding, revealing part of the framed painted scene (sky and figures) at the right; appears wall-mounted and slightly worn — estimated distance ~1.0 m from camera.

Wall-mounted light-colored rectangular picture frame with a white mat surrounding a small square beach/umbrella print; frame is partially occluded by a diagonal wooden staircase banister and appears small-to-medium in size, roughly 2.5 meters from the camera.

Edge-cropped close-up of a dark brown polished wooden side table showing the rectangular top, molded apron and a short squared leg with a visible lower stretcher shelf; glossy finish with minor wear and papers partially visible on the tabletop — appears close to the camera (≈0.8 m).

Wall-mounted rectangular picture frame with a thin black outer border and white mat surrounding a faint monochrome print; glass-covered and partially cropped at the lower-right and partially occluded by a diagonal wooden railing, with minor glare on the glass — appears about 3.0 meters from the camera.

Rectangular black picture frame with a white mat and a light-toned sketch or print inside, hung on a wall and partially occluded by a diagonal wooden handrail and white balusters in the foreground; frame is slightly edge-cropped in the image and appears to be at an estimated distance of ~2.5 m from the camera.

Partial view of an off-white, scalloped fabric table lamp shade with decorative fringe and a cream-colored base partially visible at the lower edge; lamp is edge-cropped and appears to be a small bedside/table lamp producing soft warm light, approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Partial dark brown leather three-seat couch with shiny, slightly worn upholstery and vertical tufted back cushions; visible right armrest holds a small item and the left side is cropped by the image — estimated ~1.5 meters from camera.

Wall-mounted white plastic outlet faceplate with a rectangular cover and two vertical socket openings (standard duplex style); appears fully visible and intact against a beige wall with slight shadowing, photographed from roughly 0.8 m away.

Partial interior window with a white painted frame and closed horizontal slatted (plastic) blinds, right edge of the frame visible and the crop is cut off at top and bottom; exterior building shapes are visible diffusely through the blinds; slight blur/overexposure suggests the window is approximately 1.2 m from the camera.

Close, partial view of a dark-painted rectangular mantel surround with recessed horizontal paneling above a deep black firebox opening; the interior shows a small exposed area of rough stone or soot at the bottom center, the lower firebox is cut off by the crop and the surround is edge-cropped (approx. 0.6 m from camera).

Partial, edge-cropped potted plant showing several long, arching green leaves with lighter variegation and a small dark pot at the lower area; the crop is low-resolution and slightly blurred, plant appears close to the camera (approx. 0.5 m).

Wall-mounted analog clock with a white face, black Roman numerals and black hands set in a scalloped dark glossy metal or plastic frame; full clock is visible but image is slightly blurred/low resolution, estimated diameter ~0.3–0.35 m and approximately 1.5 m from the camera.

Off-white terry-cloth towel folded and hanging vertically (likely over a rail), showing looped texture and light wrinkles; medium bath-towel size, partially cropped at the bottom and right edge of the crop, appears to be about 0.8 m from the camera.

Close-up view (≈0.7 m) of a dark brown/black glossy leather recliner with a tall padded back and wide cushioned armrest; pronounced horizontal seam and visible creasing/wrinkling on the leather indicate wear; right side of the chair is cut off by the image edge (partial/edge-cropped).

Partial/edge-cropped view of an ornate, dark-stained wooden chair with curved carved legs and a black leather-upholstered seat; polished finish is visible on the wood and the object appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m away).

Freestanding stainless-steel oven/range front with a black glass oven window and a white towel draped over the handle; lower drawer visible and the right side of the appliance is partially cropped by the image edge — estimated ~0.9 m from camera.

Dark brown wooden two-door table base with a lighter rectangular top visible above; the base is partially edge-cropped, shows scuffed bottom edges and a small white sticker on the right door, estimated distance ~1.0 m from camera.

Tall, single-door dark stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and narrow raised frame, vertical wood grain visible, low-gloss finish, no visible hardware; full door visible in crop under dim lighting — estimated ~1.5 m from camera.

Partial close-up of a stainless steel microwave door with a dark rectangular glass window and reflective horizontal trim; edge-cropped and slightly blurred with visible surface reflections and smudges, estimated distance about 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial dark-stained wooden kitchen cabinet door with a recessed center panel and visible wood grain; upper vertical unit seen edge-cropped next to a stainless-steel appliance, approximately 0.7 meters from the camera.

Partial chrome/silver faucet spout with a curved metallic neck and rounded tip, shown edge-cropped against a light background; reflective finish and small visible portion suggest the fixture is close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m).

Close-up of a dark brown varnished wooden cabinet door showing a recessed rectangular center panel with a molded top rail and visible scuffs; front-facing and partially edge-cropped in the image, estimated distance ~1.0 m from camera.

Tall beige painted wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular inset panel, minor surface scuffs and a slight reflective sheen; partially occluded along the left edge by a dark object and photographed at close range (approx. 1.0 m).

Partial front view of a compact black and stainless-steel drip coffee maker with a glossy glass carafe and visible handle; appliance is cropped at the sides and base and shows reflective surfaces and a top reservoir area, approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

Partial close-up of a brass-colored (gold-toned) metal faucet spout and upper body, vertically oriented and cut off by the crop edge with a small dark top/handle visible; reflective surface with slight wear, appearing photographed at close range (approximately 0.5 m).

Tall, narrow dark-stained wooden cabinet with vertical paneled doors and a slimmer lighter-brown central strip; right side and part of the top are cut off by the crop (edge-cropped) and the finish shows scuffs and a slightly glossy varnish with a small chipped corner; appears to be photographed from about 2.0 m away.

Light cream rectangular low-pile rug with orange-red horizontal stripes and a short fringed edge; partially visible and cropped at the image border, lying on a hardwood floor approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Tall dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and vertical wood grain; glossy finish shows a central light reflection and minor surface wear; mostly visible but slightly edge-cropped on the right — approximate distance ~0.8 m from camera.

Close-up of a dark brown paneled wooden cabinet door with visible wood grain and semi-gloss finish; top edge and a vertical seam between doors are visible, the right side is edge-cropped and the surface shows slight wear/scuffing — approximate camera distance ~0.6 m.

Tall, dark-stained recessed-panel wooden cabinet door with a glossy finish and vertical wood grain, no visible handle, mostly visible in the crop but slightly edge-cropped at top and bottom; estimated ~1.0 m from camera.

White plastic duplex outlet cover plate with two vertical rectangular sockets and a visible central screw, wall-mounted and slightly tilted in the crop; surface shows light gray smudges and the image is low-resolution/blurred — estimated distance ≈0.6 m from camera.
clusters.representative_description: Tall dark-brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and vertical wood grain; glossy finish shows a central light reflection and minor surface wear; mostly visible but slightly edge-cropped on the right — approximate distance ~0.8 m from camera.
